Claim Strategy Session Claim Strategy Claim Strategy

About · Kitchen & bath only

I’m a marketer. Which is why you shouldn’t trust me yet.

You’ve been burned by people who say exactly what I’m about to say. So don’t take my word for it. Watch what I refuse to do.

Schedule your free strategy session →

You didn’t come here for my résumé.

You’re not here to find out where I went to school.

You’re here for one answer. Who won’t screw me this time?

I’ve watched the lead-gen racket rob good businesses for years. So I built the opposite. Here’s what that means.

Four things that made you hate marketers. I won’t do any of them.

They sold you leads. Strangers who were never going to call back. I make the homeowner who already heard your name pick you instead.

They locked you in for a year. I earn next month every month, or you walk.

They swore they owned the top of Google. Nobody does, and the guy who said so is why you’re reading this with your arms crossed.

They took your money up front. I put the risk on my side. You see the work before you owe me a dime.

I build for kitchen and bath businesses. Nothing else.

Dentists ask. Lawyers ask. Gyms ask. I turn all of them down.

A site that books kitchen jobs looks nothing like a dentist’s page with your logo dropped on top. I know what a homeowner checks before they trust you, because it’s the only thing I study.

Get me on the phone and you won’t spend ten minutes explaining your business. I already know it.

Every promise I make puts the risk on me.

A deadline I pay for missing. A number I don’t get paid for unless I move it.

You own all of it. The site, the profile, the photos, the reviews. You leave, it leaves with you.

I’d rather prove it to you than swear to it.

Don’t take the story’s word for it.

I’d rather show you than tell you. The fastest proof costs you nothing: thirty minutes where I walk through exactly where they’re choosing someone else, live, on your own Google and your own site.

You keep the plan even if you never hire me.

See where they’re choosing the other guy. Free, in 30 minutes.

In half an hour you’ll know exactly where you’re losing them online and how to start winning. Written down, yours to keep, even if you never hire me.

Book your 30-minute strategy session → 30 minutes. Kitchen and bath only.

— Shane Nguyen, Kitchen Websites

P.S. Worst case, you walk away with a free plan worth more than the half hour. Best case, you stop being the one they scroll past.
